name: RTS Limousine Svc
recent_news: Long-running Rochester, MN NEMT/disabled & elderly transport business (operating as R&S Transport Inc at same 1725 Hwy 14 E address); approved MA/MHCP provider; profiled in Post Bulletin as door-through-door specialist for disabled/elderly riders.
fit_notes: Not a true school-bus tuck-in: this is a small NEMT/disabled-adult door-through-door operator in Rochester, MN. No evidence of yellow-bus or SPED school-route contracts; likely outside Summit's core route-contract acquisition profile.

name: Security Transport Svc
recent_news: BBB profile and Yelp confirm Security Transport Services Inc (Topeka, KS) is an armored car services company founded ~2006 by Thomas Baumann; holds Kansas state cooperative contracts. Not a school-bus or student-transport operator.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. Mis-tagged in source list: this is an armored car / cash-in-transit company in Topeka, KS, not a student or special-needs transportation operator. Recommend removing from Summit pipeline.

name: Alex Limo
recent_news: Newark, CA limousine/corporate transportation operator (also dba Alex Limo VIP Services); RocketReach lists ~$1M revenue, NAICS 485 (limousine). No evidence of yellow-bus, SPED, or school-district contracts in available sources.
fit_notes: Likely not a Summit tuck-in: appears to be a Bay Area corporate/airport limousine service rather than a school or SPED contractor. SPED tagging in source list looks erroneous. De-prioritize unless evidence of SPED/NEMT route contracts surfaces.

name: Medport Medport
recent_news: Cleveland, OH NEMT operator incorporated in Ohio ~2004; serves elderly, nursing homes, and disabled riders with wheelchair-accessible vans; listed on Yelp/Manta/Yellow Pages with multiple Cleveland locations including 8104 Madison Ave and 9400 Midwest Ave. No public evidence of CMSD or other K-12 SPED route contracts.
fit_notes: Marginal fit: Cleveland-area NEMT/ambulette operator (~40 EE, ~$3M est. revenue) that could theoretically run SPED routes for CMSD, but no contract evidence found. Lower priority than yellow-bus targets; flag for follow-up if Summit wants to expand into Ohio SPED/ambulette.

name: Eldon's Five Star Transport
districts_or_customers: Marin County disabled and elderly riders
recent_news: Yelp lists Eldon's Five Star Transport (400 Smith Ranch Rd, San Rafael, CA) as CLOSED as of late 2025; historically transported disabled and elderly passengers; reviewers noted no valid contact line and refusal to disclose company info prior to closure.
fit_notes: NOT a viable tuck-in: business is closed/defunct per Yelp; was a small disabled/elderly transport operator in San Rafael, not a school-bus contractor. Recommend removing from Summit pipeline.
